workflow_name: Customer Escalation Email -> Risk Brief + Manager Loop
user_message: I need you to process this exec meeting notes from Iron Creek Mining. This is a renewal account with declining consumption.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Karen Berg <karen.berg@ironcreekmin.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-26 14:42 EST
Subject: Re: Re: executive brief Timeline

Just checking in on the executive brief proposal. Our CTO is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Karen Berg <karen.berg@ironcreekmin.com>
Date: 2024-02-24 17:49 EST
Subject: Re: Re: executive brief Timeline

Our team encountered some challenges with executive brief. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Karen Berg <karen.berg@ironcreekmin.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-04 13:54 EST
Subject: Re: Re: executive brief Timeline

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about executive brief. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF34-O trap (No native 'escalation playbook' in the skills set forces synthesis from multiple); produces complete Severity assessment, manager risk brief, customer-facing draft response, stakeholder map delta, fore
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF34-O failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF34-O failure mode (No native 'escalation playbook' in the skills set forces synthesis from multiple)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct executive brief decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF34-O -- No native 'escalation playbook' in the skills set forces synthesis from multiple
Produce structural verdict on whether current routing adequately serves this scenario
